text:
Ports Index Prowser coredumps in attempt to run Port Maker
 Submitter-Id:   current-users
 Originator:     Alex Povolotsky <tarkhil@asteroid.svib.ru>
 Synopsis:       pib coredumps in port maker mode
 Severity:       non-critical
 Priority:       low
 Category: ports
 Release:        FreeBSD 3.0-RELEASE i386
 Class:          sw-bug

Fix: 

Not known
How-To-Repeat:  Install pib, run it, select Maker from the main menu, watch the coredump
